test_cases.name: baseline_w1_get_process_status
test_cases.question: Run the get_process_status tool with the process definition key of the last deployed Process or use the process definition key 'invoice'.
test_cases.grading_hints: get_process_status should have been successfully executed with a process definition key as the parameter, and a file named get_process_status_result.json or similar should have been created.
